title: Former Biden official Deb Haaland wins New Mexico primary for governor
description: Haaland could make history as the first female Native American governor if she’s elected.

title: Hilton, Becerra lead in California’s governor primary. See live results here.
description: Latest California governor primary results as Democrats Katie Porter, Tom Steyer and Xavier Becerra and Republicans Chad Bianco, Steve Hilton vie for nominations to replace Gov. Gavin Newsom.

title: Trump’s grip on the GOP leaves Netanyahu with few places to turn
description: As Trump clamps down on Netanyahu, the Israeli leader is finding he has few avenues of appeal among American politicians.

title: Maine's Senate race and much more. Here are the primary contests to watch today
description: Republican incumbents are facing tough challenges in Maine and Nevada. In South Carolina, a crowded field of MAGA-devoted Republicans are facing off to be the next governor.

title: Trump is using California's routine vote counting to push fraud allegations
description: Several California races remain uncalled as millions of ballots still need to be counted. All regular occurrences -- and all fodder for President Trump's claims it's a sign of election fraud.

title: Federal judge strikes down Trump's $100,000 fee on new H-1B visas
description: A federal judge on Monday struck down the Trump administration's $100,000 fee on new H-1B visas. The administration announced the fee as a way of preventing foreign workers from taking American jobs.

title: Charlie Kirk’s killing convinced Vances to try for a fourth child, JD Vance says
description: The vice president writes that he had urged his wife, Usha Vance, to have another child for years, but she had said she was “done.”

title: Maine's Democratic voters have a choice to make on Graham Platner
description: As Democrat Graham Platner is poised to officially win the party's nomination Tuesday, many Democratic voters continue to support his campaign despite multiple controversies.

title: Knicks fans warn Trump to expect hostile reception at NBA Finals game
description: Some Knicks fans say the president is not welcome at Madison Square Garden.

title: The red state, blue state divide is real. But it's driven by more than just politics
description: Recent research suggests there's more going on with "ideological sorting" than simply moving to places that match one's politics. It's often one of many deciding factors, such as taxes or safety.

title: What does it mean if political scandals matter less?
description: There was a time when scandals were a death knell for political careers. But today, they're far from being career enders.

title: Trump walks out of interview after being pressed on election fraud claims
description: President Trump walked out of an interview on Sunday's "Meet the Press" after being pressed on his repeated claims that the 2020 election and last week's California primaries were "rigged."

title: Israel launches strikes on Iran after Tehran fires barrage of missiles
description: The exchange, after Tehran’s first such strike on Israel in two months, threatened to further complicate efforts to broker a peace deal aimed at ending the war.

title: Trump rejects idea that Iran betrays his 'no new wars' campaign message
description: President Trump is dismissing the idea that launching the war with Iran betrayed his refrain of "No new wars" as he campaigned for the White House in 2024.

title: Trump walks out of ‘Meet the Press’ interview when challenged over false claims
description: When pressed by host Kristen Welker, the president cited no evidence for claims about Jan. 6 and elections he said were “rigged.”

title: A big win for Trump's deportation agenda, with another fight looming
description: The Senate passed a major immigration enforcement funding bill. Now, the measure goes to the House. Lawmakers must also decide the future of a surveillance program set to expire next week.

title: Kalshi and Polymarket crack down on paid influencers claiming election fraud
description: Influencers are using prediction market odds to sow doubt in vote counting, in some cases in posts paid for by the companies themselves.
